project_requirements: Publish the completed Fast Path v2 routing and artifact-policy work as a Project Governor patch release.
Keep Codex and Claude Code plugin metadata, release notes, feature matrix, migration metadata, tests, and install instructions in sync.
Preserve dependency-free deterministic helper scripts and avoid package or lockfile changes.
Release publishing must use gh/GitHub API transport, not plain git push.

dependencies.name: Project Governor plugin
dependencies.usage: Codex and Claude Code governance plugin metadata, runtime planning, task routing, deterministic helper scripts, tests, docs, release metadata, and copied governance templates.
requirement_matches: tiny_patch routing for low-risk local fixes
artifact_policy output for file-backed versus inline evidence decisions
micro_patch and tiny_patch fast paths that skip unnecessary planning/document artifacts
template quality policies that preserve gates for non-trivial work
dependencies.notes: Patch release for workflow speed and token-efficiency improvements. It adds no dependencies, package manifests, lockfiles, runtime services, or deterministic helper schema removals.
constraints: No package manifest or lockfile changes.
Template policy changes must be surfaced through migration metadata and tests.
Additive CLI JSON output shape changes must be documented and tested.
